name: rebaptize
title: Rebaptize
description: Give your files a new name. Bulk rename, smart episode organizing, sort by date or GPS location
author: miguel_caetano_dias

commands.name: rebaptize
commands.title: Rename Files
commands.description: Bulk rename files using presets for TV shows, anime, movies, auto enumerate, date, or find & replace

commands.name: smart-organize
commands.title: Smart Organize Episodes
commands.description: Auto-detect episode numbers and organize into season folders with proper naming

commands.name: sort-by-date
commands.title: Sort Files by Date
commands.description: Organize files into folders by creation date (day, month, or year)

commands.name: sort-by-location
commands.title: Sort Photos by Location
commands.description: Organize photos into folders based on GPS location data from EXIF metadata

commands.name: smart-find-replace
commands.title: Smart Find & Replace
commands.description: Find and replace patterns in filenames with multi-rule support, regex capture groups, and file filters

commands.name: create-script
commands.title: Create Rename Script
commands.description: Build a reusable rename pipeline: filter by file type, chain multiple rename steps, save and run with an alias

commands.name: run-script
commands.title: Run Rename Script
commands.description: List and run saved rename scripts against the current Finder folder

commands.name: preset-tv-show
commands.title: Rename as TV Show
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Rename files into TV show format (Show Name S01E01)

commands.name: preset-anime
commands.title: Rename as Anime
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Rename files into anime fansub format ([Group] Name - 01 [Quality])

commands.name: preset-movie
commands.title: Rename as Movie
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Rename files into movie format (Name Year Quality)

commands.name: preset-date-based
commands.title: Rename by Date
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Rename files using their creation date

commands.name: preset-change-case
commands.title: Change Filename Case
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Convert filenames to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, or Sentence case

commands.name: preset-swap-delimiter
commands.title: Swap Filename Delimiter
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Replace dots, underscores, dashes, or any delimiter in filenames with another

commands.name: preset-auto-enumerate
commands.title: Auto Enumerate Files
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Number files sequentially, optionally sorted by creation or modification date

commands.name: preset-change-extension
commands.title: Change File Extension
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Bulk change file extensions (e.g. .jpeg to .jpg)

commands.name: instant-uppercase
commands.title: Uppercase All Filenames
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Instantly convert all filenames in the current Finder folder to UPPERCASE

commands.name: instant-lowercase
commands.title: Lowercase All Filenames
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Instantly convert all filenames in the current Finder folder to lowercase

commands.name: instant-titlecase
commands.title: Title Case All Filenames
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Instantly capitalize the first letter of every word in filenames

commands.name: instant-sentencecase
commands.title: Sentence Case All Filenames
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Instantly capitalize only the first letter of each filename

commands.name: instant-dots-to-spaces
commands.title: Replace Dots with Spaces
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Instantly replace all dots in filenames with spaces

commands.name: instant-spaces-to-dots
commands.title: Replace Spaces with Dots
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Instantly replace all spaces in filenames with dots

commands.name: instant-underscores-to-spaces
commands.title: Replace Underscores with Spaces
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Instantly replace all underscores in filenames with spaces

commands.name: instant-spaces-to-underscores
commands.title: Replace Spaces with Underscores
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Instantly replace all spaces in filenames with underscores

commands.name: instant-dashes-to-spaces
commands.title: Replace Dashes with Spaces
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Instantly replace all dashes in filenames with spaces

commands.name: instant-spaces-to-dashes
commands.title: Replace Spaces with Dashes
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Instantly replace all spaces in filenames with dashes

commands.name: instant-collapse-spaces
commands.title: Collapse Multiple Spaces
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Instantly collapse double/triple/etc spaces into single spaces in filenames

commands.name: instant-enumerate-by-name
commands.title: Enumerate Files by Name
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Instantly number files 001, 002, 003... sorted alphabetically by name

commands.name: instant-enumerate-by-date
commands.title: Enumerate Files by Date Created
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Instantly number files 001, 002, 003... sorted by creation date (oldest first)

commands.name: instant-undo
commands.title: Undo Last Rename
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Revert the last instant rename command (available for 5 minutes after execution)

commands.name: instant-remove-accents
commands.title: Remove Accents from Filenames
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Remove diacritics and accents: café → cafe, über → uber

commands.name: instant-strip-digits
commands.title: Strip Digits from Filenames
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Remove all digits from filenames

commands.name: instant-strip-special
commands.title: Strip Special Characters
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Remove brackets, symbols, and special characters from filenames

commands.name: instant-trim
commands.title: Trim Filenames
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Remove leading and trailing spaces, dashes, dots, and underscores from filenames

commands.name: instant-pad-numbers
commands.title: Add Zero Padding to Numbers
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Pad numbers in filenames to 3 digits: file1 → file001

commands.name: instant-unpad-numbers
commands.title: Remove Zero Padding from Numbers
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Remove leading zeros from numbers: file001 → file1

commands.name: instant-parent-folder
commands.title: Prepend Parent Folder Name
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Add the parent folder name before each filename: NYC/img.jpg → NYC - img.jpg

commands.name: instant-swap-parts
commands.title: Swap Filename Parts
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Swap two parts of a filename around " - " separator: Artist - Song → Song - Artist

commands.name: instant-transliterate
commands.title: Transliterate to Latin
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Convert Cyrillic, accented, and non-Latin characters to ASCII equivalents

commands.name: exif-rename
commands.title: Rename Photos by EXIF
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Rename photos using EXIF metadata: date taken, camera model, ISO, focal length

commands.name: rename-from-csv
commands.title: Rename from CSV
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Rename files using a CSV mapping of old names to new names

preferences.name: tmdbApiKey
preferences.title: TMDB API Key (Free)
preferences.description: Optional. Get a free API key at themoviedb.org to enable automatic season/episode lookup for Smart Organize Episodes.

preferences.name: tvdbApiKey
preferences.title: TheTVDB API Key ($12/year)
preferences.description: Optional. Requires a $12/year subscription at thetvdb.com. Alternative to TMDB for season/episode metadata.
